name: Vicious Mockery
description: You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments at a creature you can see within range. The creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d6 Psychic damage and have Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn. The spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).
